prompt: Review the changes in PR #21672 (branch origin/pr/21672 targeting main). This is a small 4-file frontend bugfix implementing tab validation badges in the block editor.

assertions.text: Output contains '## PR Review' header, '**Target:**' metadata line, and a verdict section (Approved/Request Changes/etc.)
Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory (only 4 files in a single project)
Review does not flag breaking changes — this is a bugfix adding tab badge functionality, no public API surface changed
Verdict is 'Approved' or 'Approved with Suggestions' (not 'Request Changes' or 'Needs re-work')
Review output is under 200 lines — proportionate to the small 4-file change
